questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Match the following
\(\begin{array}{ll}
\text{Column-I} & \text{Column - II} \\
\begin{array}{l} \text{(A) If } \left(x+\frac{1}{x}+x^2+\frac{1}{x^2}\right)^9=a_0 x^{-18}+a_1 x^{-17}+\ldots .+a_{36} x^{18}, \\ \text{ then } \left(a_0+a_2+\ldots .+a_{36}\right) \text{ is equal to} \end{array} & \text{(p) } 2^{24} \\
\text{(B) If } \left(1+x+x^2+x^3\right)^{33}=a_0+a_1 x+a_2 x^2+\ldots . .+a_{3 g} x^{33}, \text{ then } \left(a_0\right. & \text{(q) } \left(18 \times 2^{19}+1\right) \\
\text{(C) } { }^{20} \mathrm{C}_2+2{ }_2+{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{12}+3 \cdot \ldots+{ }_3{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_4+\ldots \ldots+19{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{20} \text{ is equal to} & \text{(r) } \left(2^8+2^{17}\right) \\
\text{(D) } { }^{20} \mathrm{C}_1+2 \cdot{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_2+3 \cdot{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_3+4 \cdot{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_4+\ldots . .+10 \cdot{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{10} \text{ is equal to} & \text{(5) } \quad 20\left(2^{18}+{ }^{19} \mathrm{C}_{10}\right) \\
& \text{(t) } \left(9 \times 2^{20}+1\right)
\end{array}\)
questions.solution:
(A) $\left(x+\frac{1}{x}+x^2+\frac{1}{x^2}\right)^9=a_0 x^{-18}+a_1 x^{-17}+\ldots . .+a_{36} x^{18}$
Put $\mathrm{X}=1$ and -1 , and odd
We get. $\left(a_0+a_2+\ldots . .+a_{36}\right)=\left(2^8+2^{17}\right)$
(B) $\left(1+x+x^2+x^3\right)^{13}=a_0+a_1 x+a_2 x^2+\ldots . .+a_{39} x^{39}$
Put fourth roots of unity, $1, \alpha, \alpha^2, \alpha^3$ and add together We get. $\left(a_0+a_4+a_8+a_{12}+\ldots . .+a_{66}\right)=\frac{2^{26}}{4}=2^{24}$
(C) ${ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_2+2 .{ }^{30} \mathrm{C}_3+3{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_4+\ldots . .+19 .{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{20}$
Let $(1+\mathrm{x})^{20}={ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_0+{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_1 \mathrm{x}+{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_2 \mathrm{x}^2+\ldots \ldots+{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{20} \mathrm{x}^{20}$ divide by x , and differentiae both sides,
$\left({ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_2+2{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_3+19{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{20}\right)=\left(18 \times 2^{19}\right)+1$
(D)
$\begin{aligned}
& { }^{20} \mathrm{C}_1+2 .{ }^{10} \mathrm{C}_2+3 \cdot{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_3+4 .{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_4+\ldots . .+10 .{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{10} \\
& =\sum_{r=0}^{10} \mathrm{r}{ }^{20} \mathrm{C}_{\mathrm{r}}=\sum_{\mathrm{r}=1}^{10} 20^{19} \mathrm{C}_{\mathrm{r}-1} \\
& =20\left(2^{18}+{ }^{19} \mathrm{C}_{10}\right)
\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
